headline: Uber Post Q1 Earnings: Is the Stock Worth Betting on Now?
summary: Uber beats on Q1 EPS and forecasts strong bookings despite Middle East tensions. Its shares have declined in the past six months amid robotaxi competition.

headline: UBER Expands Delivery Options Via ULTA Deal: A Growth Catalyst?
summary: UBER adds more than 1,500 Ulta Beauty stores to Uber Eats, boosting same-day beauty delivery and widening its retail push.
